title: brickellia leonis
intro: Brickellia leonis, also known as Lion's Plant, is a shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, belonging to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Brickellia leonis include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
